Soul Defiler  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 21 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 HP: +75 MANA: +75
SV DISEASE: +20 SV POISON: +20
Effect: Call of Bones (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Soul Defiler
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 21 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 HP: +75 MANA: +75
SV DISEASE: +20 SV POISON: +20
Effect: Call of Bones (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 03:06:35
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Skyshrine
NPC Name
Lord Yelinak


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Skyshrine


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Or is this an old pic?

# Nov 20 2005 at 12:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618186760910
31 posts
If youre twinking a baby SK look no further .

I farmed one of these a while back with a buddy sham while I tanked Yeli with my monk .

At lvl 26 atm my SK does actually somewhat surprising DPS .
▲ Page top
RE: Primary/Secondary?
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2005 at 12:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618186760910
31 posts
Oh and before I get flamed by someone who doesnt know any better , yes I know the proc is req lvl 50 .

You still get the 21/19 ratio :p
▲ Page top
RE: Primary/Secondary?
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2023 at 2:28 AM Rating: Decent
LydiusInsidious
Scholar
108 posts
Weapon damage, haste, regen and things like that are capped, those caps release around 51, 55, 60, 65 and up
▲ Page top
This is a great weapon
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2004 at 9:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1713744959930
17 posts
My guild downed Yelinak awhile ago and there were no SK's on the raid and this dropped. I had a 55 SK close and ran him to Yelinak's corpse and looted this for nothing. For free this is an awesome weapon and since my SK is only 58 now this is still a great weapon. The ratio, resists, HP and other stats are great.

I have one problem with it though. My chars are on separate accounts and my main is a 65 chanter. This means that when I 2-box my SK and chanter I have VoQ (and VQ hehe) on my SK at all times. The effect CANCELS NDT eventhough I'm VoQ'd. This has repeatedly bugged me. I've sent bugreports and feedbacks but I don't think it'll be fixed soon. The illusion component of both spells are conflicting. Mind you, if you are in skelly form the NDT will not cancel it.

NDT is primarily a combat innate and not illusion and has much more benefit over the mana regen of Call of Bones.

/rant

Enjoy the weapon if you have it. Despite it's minor problems I love it!
▲ Page top
RE: This is a great weapon
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2004 at 6:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591797730523
54 posts
if you 2box a chanter of all things then just hit your sk with scarecrow and never worry about it again
▲ Page top
RE: This is a great weapon
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2006 at 11:25 PM Rating: Decent
Paylin
276 posts
Quote:
if you 2box a chanter of all things then just hit your sk with scarecrow and never worry about it again
... they said the effect CANCELS NDT (scarecrow) ... so, giving their SK "scarecrow" wouldnt do a thing except cause the timer on it to click in, and also cause them to have wasted mana

situational
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 1:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778711918
15 posts
Nice weapon, but very situational:
Soloing/fear-kiting w/out good enough mana regen.

Otherwise, you should be using a 2hs for better dps or a Frostwrath (equal dps, but 150dd proc.)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 15 2003 at 3:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have a noct as well as a Moss and i used a slow **** AP as my main weapons til i was talking to this cleric in a POD group..She turned me onto a Two tined corpse pitchfork..Sold the AP and my knoct and moss set in bank rusting now. I used to think that i had to hit for 3-400 to be very usefull in grp..With this pitchfork i do around 6-700 damage befor those expenisive windblades can double for 400. I'm telling you guys, this thing flat **** rocks, watch out for argo though if you not the main tank--)
RE: DPS
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2003 at 11:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245755903
39 posts
WTF are you talking about? Are you talking about the Soul Defiler or the Two-Tined Corpse Pitchfork? Because it sounds like you're talking about the pitchfork, yet posting on the Soul Defiler and either way not making much sense.

This weapon really is only any good for the effect, the ratio is very nice but 2h weapons own 1h weapons.
▲ Page top
sk dual wield
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 10:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779986122
View User Forum
63 posts
is it me or does this say secondary, so then could a sk put this in secondary then put another sword in primary? woudl that make them able ot dual weild?
▲ Page top
RE: sk dual wield
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 11:05 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1594570800594
Scholar
36 posts
It's the skill and not the weapon that makes a difference. For example: A warrior may have two 1 hand weapons that can be put in either melee slots but can't equip both until level 13 (Warrior and Rogue duel wield level). Hope that helps.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 16 2002 at 10:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is it me or does this say secondary, so then could a sk put this in secondary then put another sword in primary? woudl that make them able ot dual weild?
which is it?

Once you know the strategy to killing yeli easy u can do it with id say 24 people preety easy. we have killed him many times with between 29 and 35 with only 1 or 2 deaths and those being losses to enrage or low health aggro.

Spawn Time???
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2002 at 2:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776622996
View User Forum
44 posts
Hello guys and gals, I was just wondering if anyone out there knew the spawn time on old boy Lord Yelinak? I would like to kill him with my guild but I do not know if we can do it or not. We have about 41 level 60's and about 60 active peeps altogether. I was just wondering if it truely was possible to kill him with only 37 peeps like some people reported. In any case I would like to know when he spawns and how many people it would take to kill him please. Thank you very much.

Zantetsukane Odinsfury
55th Level Teir'Dal Revenant
Rune of War
Veeshan Server!

"Whatever waits I have NO regrets!!!"
▲ Page top
RE: Spawn Time???
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2002 at 4:34 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591775970994
Scholar
399 posts
Not 100% sure about spawn time, but definitely can be killed with 37 peeps. I have a friend that claimed that guild killed him with about 30, but this guild is about a Tier 6 or so guild, so they probably could.

Luna
▲ Page top
Yelinak uses this thing
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 3:52 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759693885
32 posts
My guild killed Yelinak for the first time a little while ago, he was wielding this sword.. And proc'ing it.. Thus turning his huge dragon form into a tiny little skeleton for all our melee classes to crowd around. Our rogues couldn't land backstabs to save their lives.

What's more, changing Yeli from dragon to skeleton disables dragonbane for wizards.

Suffice it to say, I think Yeli's a lot harder when he has this weapon...
▲ Page top
RE: Yelinak uses this thing
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 1:53 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
OK this is a bit off topic. WTF is VI thinking with this illusion crap. Dragon goes to skel form because of necro nuke lets say. Now you can't land the Drangon's bane on it because it's not a dragon right? Except you can't land undead spells on it either. So wizards are to stupid to see past the illusion, but necro's aren't?

It's just very irritating to have 2 nukes you never use. You don't use them soloing because your DoT's are so much more mana efficent. And you don't use them grouped because it changes the melee box. And the illusionless nukes are hard to find. <**** **** ****>
▲ Page top
RE: Yelinak uses this thing
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2002 at 5:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592793189386
22 posts
dang good point :) made me chuckle a bit. I always wondered (as a cleric) why I couldn't undead nuke a necro dot'ed mob.

vaelil 65 cleric
caramen 65 rogue
▲ Page top
How Screwed Up Is This?
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 6:54 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591772292382
6 posts
OK, I am an sk so i'm not complaining but DAMN. Do you realize that if you goto Equipment->by slot, 1 handed slash, and scroll down to the bottom of the list where the best weps by ratio are that this sword is the best (by ratio) 1hs in the game?! (Useable, of course, the Sword of Truth cannot be used by any races or players) And its SK only, most of which have been using 2hs most of the time. Then, further up the list the next few swords are sk/pal usable! You have to go up at least five spaces to find a 1hs thats warrior usable. Those DW bastards are supposed to get better gear than us, well guess again...
▲ Page top
RE: How Screwed Up Is This?
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2002 at 12:12 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591781085237
61 posts
Too bad there are 14/18 daggers from luclin which blow the **** out of 14/21...
▲ Page top
RE: How Screwed Up Is This?
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2002 at 4:31 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts
This sword was upgraded a bit ago to 21/19, I believe. There just isn't an SS for the new ratio.

And you can't really compare SK/Pal 1h weapons to dual-wielder 1h weapons. Sure, the ratio is much, much better on high-end knight 1h weapons, but that's because they lack dual-wield. If you look at two high-end DW weapons (like the acrylia handled broadsword and baton of flame, for example), their damage output would be quite a bit higher than this weapon.
▲ Page top
RE: How Screwed Up Is This?
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 5:51 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591768443676

is 21/19 and a very nice sk weapon

▲ Page top
Upgraded
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2001 at 12:10 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361487146
24 posts
The new upgrade to 21/19 has made turned the weapon from Ho-Hum to Holy-Moly!

Having been blessed with this weapon PRIOR to the upgrade, I was merely playing with it for the cool skeleton form proc. Now, it is my main weapon. I have even stopped working on my epic, since this has a better ratio and I can use a shield with it, boosting my AC/HP much more than a lifetap-DoT proc ever could.

I can out-taunt a non-epic-wielding level 60 warrior with this thing, without resorting to using my Taunt skill or casting spells.

▲ Page top

*UPGRADED*
